summary: Completed Phase 4 testing of MemoraAI. All 24 backend API tests pass (100%). All 3 new frontend pages verified working: Appointments Manager, Analytics Dashboard, Template Workflow. Dashboard shows new nav cards for all Phase 4 features.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests. Existing data: 2 appointments (Horoscope Reading, Marriage Matching), 6 auto-generated templates (all draft status).
context_for_next_testing_agent: MemoraAI Phase 4 testing complete. All new features verified: 1) Appointment Management - CRUD operations, status actions (complete/no-show), today's summary, filters working. 2) Analytics Dashboard - KPIs, charts, service breakdown, period selector (today/week/month) working. 3) Template Workflow - CRUD, auto-generate, submit/approve/reject workflow working. Meta WhatsApp API not connected so template submission goes to 'pending_review' status instead of 'submitted'.

phase4_appointment_apis.GET /api/memoraai/appointments: PASS - List with filters (status, date, service)

phase4_analytics_apis.GET /api/memoraai/analytics/overview: PASS - Category analytics with period filter

phase4_template_apis.POST /api/memoraai/templates/{id}/submit: PASS - Submit for review (goes to pending_review without Meta)

phase4_frontend_pages./memoraai-appointments: PASS - Today summary, add form, appointment list, status filters, action buttons
phase4_frontend_pages./memoraai-analytics: PASS - KPI cards, WhatsApp stats, daily trend chart, popular services, service breakdown table, customer insights
phase4_frontend_pages./memoraai-templates: PASS - Status summary, create/auto-generate buttons, template form, templates list with workflow actions
phase4_frontend_pages.Dashboard nav cards: PASS - Appointments, Analytics & Reports, Template Workflow cards visible in MemoraAI section

mocked_apis.WhatsApp Meta API: Not connected - template submission goes to 'pending_review' instead of 'submitted'. Internal workflow (approve/reject) works correctly.
